completed_tasks.name: First-opinion code review on 52dbada..HEAD (20 files, deep depth)

remaining_tasks.name: Second-opinion review (superpowers:code-reviewer)
remaining_tasks.notes: Two stream-idle timeouts (10min and 5min). Agent started reading files but never wrote REVIEW-2.md. User was asked to pick: (a) orchestrator does inline cross-check, (b) skip second opinion, (c) retry with different agent. Session paused before user answered.

remaining_tasks.name: Triage REVIEW.md findings + G-01..G-12 gaps into: fix-in-7.1 / defer-to-owning-phase / won't-do

blockers.description: superpowers:code-reviewer agent times out on this repo (2 attempts: 10min, 5min). Not clear if cause is repo size, file count, or environment.
blockers.workaround: Orchestrator can do inline cross-check on the 9 critical findings directly — faster and more reliable than a third retry.

human_actions_pending.action: Pick cross-check path: (1) inline cross-check by orchestrator, (2) skip second opinion and triage with REVIEW.md only, (3) retry second opinion with different agent type
human_actions_pending.context: User leaned toward two independent opinions before triage. Two agent timeouts force a decision.

decisions.decision: Insert Phase 7.1 for manager-commit fixes + selected BaseComponent gaps (not inline, not a global sweep)
decisions.rationale: base_component.py is load-bearing; Phase 8 code components will inherit any bugs silently. Dedicated phase gives atomic commits, verification, rollback point.

decisions.decision: Two reviewers run as separate passes, not concurrent on same pass
decisions.rationale: Running both blind wastes cycles. gsd-code-review first, then superpowers on ambiguous findings only.

decisions.decision: Triage G-01..G-12 during discuss (with evidence), not upfront
decisions.rationale: Scope-boundary rule: G-09 error flow routing, G-11 per-input NB_LINE, G-06/G-07/G-08 input schema/defaults/key likely belong to other phases (Phase 8 code components or Phase 12 integration testing), not a BaseComponent phase.

decisions.decision: Deep depth chosen for first review (not standard default)
decisions.rationale: base_component.py has cross-file implications for every component; not a routine phase review.

decisions.decision: Proper diff base is 52dbada, not c6860d9
decisions.rationale: c6860d9 is a merge commit; c6860d9..HEAD shows only post-merge doc. 52dbada is where manager's branch diverged (12 commits).

next_action: Ask user to pick cross-check path (inline / skip / retry) from the 3 options presented before pause. Then proceed to triage.
context_notes: Manager committed 12 commits on feature/engine-restructure-cloned-copy, merged via PR #12. Changes touch base_component.py (load-bearing), aggregate_row, file I/O, filter_rows, context_load (after Phase 9 shipped), pom.xml, and 9 new Java routine files. First review found 9 criticals including: base_component reject-schema regression, Decimal precision type crash, Windows-absolute pom.xml repo path (blocks Mac/Linux build), aggregate_row.list_object returns string not list, file_output multi-char delimiter produces unreadable files. All 12 documented gaps (G-01..G-12) confirmed + 3 new gaps (G-13/14/15) surfaced. Project state: Phase 09 complete, Phase 8 next but deferred until 7.1 closes the manager-commit audit loop.
